params.positive_prompt: Macro documentary still life inside a quiet aerospace materials lab, one shallow brushed-metal inspection tray on a gray worktable holding several black rubber O-ring seal segments arranged routinely, one segment has a tiny eroded notch and faint soot at the seam, the rest of the tray is clean and procedural, blurred instrument housings and archive boxes in the background with no legible writing, a single small amber inspection lamp reflected softly on the tray, restrained gray-green industrial palette, soft diffuse fluorescent lighting, clinical official normalcy, the small damaged seal made physically legible, vertical 9:16 composition, centered readable subject, ultra realistic, restrained documentary photography, sharp but not glossy
params.negative_prompt: no text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no digits, people, hands, faces, control room, computer monitors, monitor UI, legible writing, no labels, no charts, no logos, no NASA worm logo, no stickers, no decals, no placards, no serial tags, no serial plates, no engraved plates, no warning signs, no warning plates, no stamped markings, no screen digits, no icon plates, no symbol plates, no interface readouts, no readable ui, Midjourney look, sci-fi props, dramatic explosion, fireball, smoke plume, floating debris, cluttered collage, extra O-rings merging together, deformed rubber, cartoon CGI, glossy product ad lighting, high detail clutter, noisy surface, many objects, crowded scene, dramatic cinematic lighting, motion blur, action pose, ornate realism, multiple bright accents, watermark, ui overlay
params.note_text: Challenger beat_05 replacement carrier. Non-Midjourney macro parts-bin witness concept for motion-safe LTX animation: no people, no hands, no monitors, no legible writing.
params.accent_palette: gray green, brushed metal, black rubber, one muted amber signal
params.safe_zone_intent: keep the tray and damaged seal readable in the middle field without requiring text or monitor UI
params.signal_anchor: one damaged O-ring seal segment in an otherwise routine inspection tray
params.historical_anchor: Challenger normalized-damage thesis expressed as one small damaged seal made routine
params.surreal_breach: one tiny eroded soot-marked seal segment is treated like a normal catalogued part

prompt_fragments.anchor_fragment: macro aerospace inspection tray with black rubber O-ring seal segments
support_fragments: one tiny eroded soot-marked notch carries the whole normalized-damage thesis
lab background stays blurred and captionless so motion cannot mutate writing or UI
directives: no people, hands, faces, monitors, or legible writing
single clear damaged-seal subject with routine institutional treatment
motion-safe still: later animation should be limited to lamp breathing, dust shimmer, and faint soot-edge shimmer
